Patch Set 1:

Hi Andreas, Sébastien, and Yingjin. This patch is #2 in the multi-fileset patch series. This patch focuses on setting up the fileset ID handling and supporting it in the nodemap IAM. This is not very useful for the current single fileset, but this patch should outline how it will work for multi-alt-filesets.

Whenever you have some time, could you please review it?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(2 comments)

Minor improvements if patch is refreshed.

Patch Set 1:

Looks good, with the exception of the inverted return value in nodemap_cluster_fileset_helper().

parents.subject: LU-18357 ptlrpc: Use dynamic memory allocation for filesets

commit.subject: LU-18357 ptlrpc: Add fileset ID handling on the nodemap IAM
commit.message:
LU-18357 ptlrpc: Add fileset ID handling on the nodemap IAM

For handling multiple filesets in the nodemap's IAM cluster idx space,
the cluster idx subids must be associated with a fileset id and vice
versa. This allows to place fileset fragments in the correct subid
range and to assign retrieved fragments to the correct fileset.

This patch adds these calculations for a single fileset with the work
for multiple alternate filesets pending.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I7bef5218ebb38d57d0e3aa6aab499111733eaef7
